source_pr.title: executor: migrate test-infra to testify for testSuite1

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select * from t1 partition(p0) order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 a", "2 b")) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select * from t1 partition(p0) order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 a", "2 b")) (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: This PR migrates the legacy executor `testSuite1` from gocheck-style suites to testify. Framework migration can reduce flaky suite lifecycle / fixture issues by adopting modern `testing.T` + testify patterns.
fix_pattern: Migrate gocheck-based executor test suites to testify (modern Go `testing.T` patterns), updating suite setup/teardown and assertions.
